description: A compliance manager needs to schedule the annual test of an emergency shutdown (ESD) valve at a city gate station.

nodes.task_description: Identify all ESD valves that are due for their annual test in the next quarter.

expected_outcome.value: System produces a list of valves requiring testing.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with gas control operators to schedule the test during a low-demand period to minimize disruption.

expected_outcome.value: System finds an optimal time slot for the test.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the maintenance crew, including the detailed testing procedure and safety protocols.

expected_outcome.value: System generates and dispatches the work order.
